body.title: Fix InferenceTransport kwargs to match make_context signature
body.result: Shipped in 598c5424. _run_inference now calls make_context with supported kwargs (research_mode, complexity) threaded from metadata; purpose flows as purpose_id to gw.call as originally intended; metadata with no ctx slot is dropped with log trace. Before fix: 100% of comms://model/* requests TypeError'd and silently returned error strings. 6 new smoke tests cover round-trip, no-TypeError, complexity/research_mode propagation, exception handling, None-safety.
body.description:
From Pass-2 Area 5 Gap 1 (critical). `lab/utility_closet/transports/inference.py:_run_inference` calls `make_context(purpose=..., metadata=...)` but `make_context` at `wild_igor/igor/cognition/inference_gateway.py:1207` takes `(is_background, is_user_turn, research_mode, complexity)`. Every comms://model/* request TypeErrors and returns '[inference-error] TypeError: unexpected keyword argument'. Entire chattable-LLM-channel surface dead on arrival, masked only by `log.error` + string-return — no alarm beyond.

Fix: build ctx with supported args (research_mode, complexity) and pass purpose through to gw.call() as purpose_id=purpose (which is already the signature). Drop the metadata pass-through — make_context doesn't store it and gw.call's kwargs forward to handlers.

**Affected files:** lab/utility_closet/transports/inference.py, new tests/test_inference_transport.py.
**Design rules:** docs-in-code, test-plan-or-why-not.
**Scope boundary:** IN — fix _run_inference signature mismatch, add smoke test that monkeypatches gateway and asserts successful round-trip. OUT — redesigning InferenceContext; changing gw.call's kwargs; touching inference_gateway itself.
**Test plan:** tests/test_inference_transport.py — monkeypatch get_gateway() to a stub gateway; assert _run_inference('hello', 'default', {}) returns gateway response text, not [inference-error]; assert no TypeError raised.
